{{CargoOrgan
|name=Crystal Insect Eye
|type=Common
|rank=blue
|id=10808
|idx=9
|description=These eyes are fashioned upon insect eyes, with thousands of lenses working together to portray an accurate image, reaching unprecedented precision and resolution.
|skill=
|hp=1638
|def=96
|atk=87
|rush=71
|gene1=Per 5 Apostles defeated, {race} RUSH +10
Apostles defeated: 15/15
|gene2=In exploration, 2% chance to gain 2x Treasure Maps
|gene3=In explorations, B-tads gained +2.5%
|gene7=In explorations, B-tads gained +2.5% (Awakened)
|}}
